name: python3-libewf
title: python3-libewf
summary: support for Expert Witness Compression format -- Python 3 bindings
description:
support for Expert Witness Compression format -- Python 3 bindings
Libewf is a library with support for reading and writing the Expert Witness
Compression Format (EWF).
This library allows you to read media information of EWF files in the SMART
(EWF-S01) format and the EnCase (EWF-E01) format. It supports files created
by EnCase 1 to 6, linen and FTK Imager. The libewf is useful for forensics
investigations.
.
This package contains Python 3 bindings for libewf.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-libewf because support for Expert Witness Compression format -- Python 3 bindings.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-libewf as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-libewf with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-libewf --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
